summary: 15-minute conversational screen for a Data Scientist. Focus on problem framing, modelling rigor, and communicating results.

competencies.name: Problem framing
competencies.description: Translating a business question into a measurable modelling problem.

competencies.name: Modelling & validation
competencies.description: Choosing approaches, avoiding leakage, validating honestly.

competencies.name: Communication of results
competencies.description: Explaining findings and uncertainty to non-technical stakeholders.

interview_topics.title: Problem framing
questions: A product team asks you to 'reduce churn'. How do you turn that into a modelling problem?
What metric would you optimise, and why?

interview_topics.title: Modelling & validation
questions: How do you guard against data leakage in your validation setup?
How do you decide a model is good enough to ship?

inspector_criteria: Quality of problem framing and metric choice
Rigor in validation and leakage avoidance
